TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Claude Akins == kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 5, Claude Akins, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1994) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Akins htagan beh sa cyacyaco na'sing.mrkyas beh Tiannaco petput qalang qasa. hiya ga te sazing cinbwanan mciriq mtzyaw squ menteng ru beriping na hetay Amirika. masoq mciriq lga.1949 kawas tmasoq mqwas biru beh sipe hopa pqwasan biru. 1953 kawas aycings hya ga mhtuw beh . Claude Akins mhuqil beh cyalipuniya pasatina. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨlau*e akins~ɕ == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨlau*e akins~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) akins~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨo naʔs~ɕiŋ.mrkjas~ɕ βeħ tiannaʦ~ʨo petput qalaŋ qas~ɕa. ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq mtzjaw s~ɕqu menteŋ ru βeripiŋ na ħetaj amirika. mas~ɕoq mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa.**** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ s~ɕipe ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ ajʦ~ʨiŋs~ɕ ħja ɣa mħtuw βeħ . ʦ~ʨlau*e akins~ɕ mħuqil βeħ ʦ~ʨjalipunija pas~ɕatina. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: == Claude Akins == kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 5, Claude Akins, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1994) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Akins htagan beh sa cyacyaco na'sing.mrkyas beh Tiannaco petput qalang qasa. hiya ga te sazing cinbwanan mciriq mtzyaw squ menteng ru beriping na hetay Amirika. masoq mciriq lga.1949 kawas tmasoq mqwas biru beh sipe hopa pqwasan biru. 1953 kawas aycings hya ga mhtuw beh . Claude Akins mhuqil beh cyalipuniya pasatina. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨlau*e akins~ɕ == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨlau*e akins~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) akins~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨo naʔs~ɕiŋ.mrkjas~ɕ βeħ tiannaʦ~ʨo petput qalaŋ qas~ɕa. ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq mtzjaw s~ɕqu menteŋ ru βeripiŋ na ħetaj amirika. mas~ɕoq mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa.**** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ s~ɕipe ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ ajʦ~ʨiŋs~ɕ ħja ɣa mħtuw βeħ . ʦ~ʨlau*e akins~ɕ mħuqil βeħ ʦ~ʨjalipunija pas~ɕatina. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
